productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Furano 2 White Indigo Silver Shoe
description: These lightweight white and navy blue shoes from the Furano 2 range of adidas are probably the most stylishly comfortable training shoes you can ever find. These shoes provide a combination of enhanced cushioning and stability, besides superior traction and protection to the feet. You can also team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperSynthetic leather uppers with perforations for ventilationSynthetic white lace-ups for better FitTPU moulded stripes for supportPadded collar and tongue, soft fabric shoe lining and cushioned insole provide all day comfortInsoleEVA insole for comfortNon-slip lining for comfort and performanceSoft, padded sockliner for snug fit, comfort and shock absorptionMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight cushioning and shock absorptionOutsoleEngineered with adiWear technology for high traction and extreme durability Toe guard and heel counter provide extra protectionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
